evals.prompt: How do I set up round-robin scheduling for my sales team of 8 reps?
evals.expected_output: Round-robin configuration guide with weighting options and tool recommendations.

assertions.name: routing_options
assertions.description: Must explain round-robin routing options: equal distribution, weighted by capacity, territory-based, or skill-based

assertions.name: tool_recommendations
assertions.description: Must recommend specific tools for team round-robin (Calendly Teams, Chili Piper, or HubSpot Meetings)

assertions.name: crm_integration
assertions.description: Must mention integrating round-robin with CRM for automatic rep assignment and meeting logging

evals.prompt: My no-show rate for demos is 28% — how do I reduce it?
evals.expected_output: No-show reduction strategy with reminder sequences, pre-meeting engagement, and recovery workflow.

assertions.name: benchmark_context
assertions.description: Must benchmark 28% as high (target <15%, great is <10%) and identify it as a fixable problem

assertions.name: reminder_sequence
assertions.description: Must recommend a multi-touch reminder sequence (24hr, 1hr, and/or day-of)

assertions.name: recovery_workflow
assertions.description: Must provide a no-show recovery workflow including automatic reschedule link and follow-up email

evals.prompt: Set up meeting scheduling in Yesware with Zoom integration
evals.expected_output: Step-by-step Yesware Meeting Scheduler setup with Zoom auto-link configuration.

assertions.name: yesware_steps
assertions.description: Must provide Yesware-specific steps for creating event types and sharing booking links

assertions.name: zoom_integration
assertions.description: Must explain how Zoom meeting links are automatically generated in calendar invites

assertions.name: limitations
assertions.description: Must note Yesware Meeting Scheduler limitations (no round-robin, limited event types on free plan)
